content: Hi, I'm Dana, a wedding planner. I've been reading a lot of romance novels to get inspiration for my work. Have you come across any good romance books or authors lately?
Hi Dana! Yes, I've come across some great romance authors and books. One author that I think you might enjoy is Emily Giffin. She writes really engaging and relatable stories.
I love Emily Giffin's books! I've been reading a lot of her novels lately. I've also been knitting in my free time, it's a great way to relax and create something beautiful.
Knitting is a great hobby! It's wonderful that you're able to create something beautiful and relaxing. Do you have a favorite type of project to knit, or a favorite yarn to work with?
I love knitting scarves and hats. I've been using a lot of merino wool yarn lately, it's so soft and warm. I've also been surfing a lot, it's a great way to clear my mind and get some exercise.
Surfing is a great way to stay active and connect with nature. Merino wool is a wonderful yarn to work with - it's so versatile and cozy. Have you traveled to any exciting surf spots recently?

I actually just got back from a trip to Hawaii, it was amazing! The surfing was incredible, and the scenery was just breathtaking. I've also been working on a side project, creating an online course on wedding planning.
Hawaii is a beautiful place! It's great that you were able to combine your love of surfing with your work as a wedding planner. What inspired you to create an online course on wedding planning?

I've been getting a lot of requests from couples who want to plan their own weddings, but don't know where to start. I thought it would be helpful to create a resource that could guide them through the process. I've been working on it for a few months now, and I'm hoping to launch it by the end of the summer.
That's a great idea! I'm sure your course will be really helpful to couples who are planning their weddings. Do you have any plans to promote the course, or will you be relying on word of mouth?

I've been thinking about promoting it through social media, and maybe partnering with some wedding vendors to offer exclusive discounts to my students. I've also been considering starting a travel blog to document my surfing and travel adventures.

A travel blog sounds like a great idea! It's a wonderful way to share your experiences and connect with others who are interested in surfing and travel. Have you thought about how you'll balance your work as a wedding planner with your side projects?
It's great that you're thinking about how to balance your work and side projects. Maybe you can set aside specific times of the day or week to focus on each project.
